title: What is Python?
content: Explain what Python is and why it is called a high-level programming language.

title: Who developed Python?
content: Name the creator of Python and the year it was created.

title: Python Features
content: List five main features of Python programming language.

title: Dynamic Typing
content: Explain what dynamic typing means in Python.

title: Interpreted Language
content: Why is Python called an interpreted language?

title: Python Identifiers
content: What are identifiers in Python and what are the naming rules?

title: Keywords in Python
content: What are Python keywords? Give any five examples.

title: Data Types in Python
content: List Python's built-in data types.

title: Mutable and Immutable
content: Explain mutable and immutable data types with examples.

title: Operators in Python
content: What are operators? Explain arithmetic, relational, and logical operators.

title: Type Casting
content: What is type casting in Python? Give examples.

title: Functions in Python
content: What is a function? How is it defined in Python?

title: Lambda Function
content: What is a lambda function in Python? Give an example.

title: Modules and Packages
content: What are modules and packages in Python?

title: Global and Local Variables
content: Explain the difference between global and local variables.

title: Docstrings
content: What are docstrings? How are they used in Python?

title: File Handling in Python
content: Explain file handling and different file modes in Python.

title: Exception Handling
content: What is exception handling? Explain try, except, else, and finally blocks.

title: Object-Oriented Programming
content: Explain the concept of OOP in Python with an example.

title: Inheritance in Python
content: What is inheritance in Python? Mention its types.

title: Polymorphism
content: Explain polymorphism with a simple example in Python.

title: Encapsulation
content: What is encapsulation in Python? Give an example using classes.

title: List vs Tuple
content: Differentiate between a list and a tuple.

title: Dictionary in Python
content: What is a dictionary in Python? How do you access elements?

title: Set in Python
content: What is a set? Write any two operations performed on a set.

title: Program: Print Hello World
content: Write a Python program to print 'Hello, World!'.

title: Program: Add Two Numbers
content: Write a Python program to add two numbers entered by the user.

title: Program: Check Even or Odd
content: Write a Python program to check whether a number is even or odd.

title: Program: Find Factorial
content: Write a Python program to find the factorial of a given number.

title: Program: Check Prime Number
content: Write a Python program to check if a number is prime.

title: Program: Fibonacci Sequence
content: Write a Python program to print the Fibonacci sequence up to N terms.

title: Program: Sum of Digits
content: Write a Python program to find the sum of digits of a number.

title: Program: Reverse a String
content: Write a Python program to reverse a string entered by the user.

title: Program: Palindrome Check
content: Write a Python program to check if a string is palindrome or not.

title: Program: Count Vowels
content: Write a Python program to count vowels in a string.

title: Program: Find Largest Number
content: Write a Python program to find the largest of three numbers.

title: Program: Area of Circle
content: Write a Python program to find the area of a circle given the radius.

title: Program: LCM of Two Numbers
content: Write a Python program to find the LCM of two numbers.

title: Program: GCD of Two Numbers
content: Write a Python program to find the GCD of two numbers.

title: Program: Sum of List Elements
content: Write a Python program to find the sum of all elements in a list.

title: Program: Second Largest in List
content: Write a Python program to find the second largest element in a list.

title: Program: Sort a List
content: Write a Python program to sort a list in ascending order without using sort().

title: Program: Count Characters in String
content: Write a Python program to count frequency of each character in a string.

title: Program: File Write and Read
content: Write a Python program to write user input to a file and then read it back.

title: Program: Check Armstrong Number
content: Write a Python program to check if a number is an Armstrong number.

title: Program: Sum of Even Numbers
content: Write a Python program to find the sum of first N even numbers.

title: Program: List of Prime Numbers
content: Write a Python program to print all prime numbers in a given range.

title: Program: Matrix Addition
content: Write a Python program to add two matrices of same size.

title: Program: OOP Student Class
content: Write a Python class Student with attributes name and marks, and display details.

title: Program: Simple Calculator
content: Write a Python program that performs +, -, *, / operations based on user input.
